$description: Solidigm canonical breakpoints. Modernized from Bootstrap 5 (576/992) to align with current device reality and Tailwind/Material Design 3 conventions.

lg.$description: Tablet landscape / small laptop (was 992 in legacy).

com.solidigm.brand.rationale: Updated `sm` 576→640 and `lg` 992→1024 to match modern device reality. Naming uses xs/sm/md/lg/xl/2xl (Tailwind convention) instead of xs/sm/md/lg/xl/xxl.
com.solidigm.brand.evidence: Storybook + AEM use Bootstrap defaults (576/768/992/1280/1440). Both are decade-old defaults. Modern systems (Tailwind v3, MD3) use 640/768/1024/1280/1440.
